inputs.label: Revenue per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average selling price per unit. Based on standard cost accounting principles (Horngren).

inputs.label: Units Sold
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity sold to customer over analysis period. From sales records.

inputs.label: Variable Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct materials, direct labor, variable overhead per unit. Based on standard costing (ABC).

inputs.label: Fixed Cost Allocation
inputs.businessContext: Allocated fixed costs (e.g., factory rent, equipment depreciation) for this product-customer. Based on activity-based costing (Kaplan).

inputs.label: Customer-Specific Costs
inputs.businessContext: Costs directly attributable to customer (e.g., special packaging, logistics, sales support). From customer profitability analysis (Shapiro).

inputs.label: Discounts and Allowances
inputs.businessContext: Price discounts, trade allowances, rebates given to customer. Standard in trade spend analysis.

inputs.label: Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units returned by customer. Based on quality metrics (Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Cost of Capital
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) for the firm. Standard finance (Brealey & Myers).

inputs.label: Average Collection Period
inputs.businessContext: Days sales outstanding for this customer. From accounts receivable aging.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment (ISO 31000).

thresholds.returnRate: returnRate > 5 ? 'High return rate may indicate quality issues' : ''
thresholds.profitMargin: profitMargin < 0 ? 'Negative profit margin - review pricing or costs' : ''
thresholds.customerSpecificCosts: customerSpecificCosts > 0.2 * (revenuePerUnit * unitsSold) ? 'Customer-specific costs exceed 20% of revenue' : ''

suggestedActions: profitMargin < 0 ? 'Review pricing strategy or reduce costs' : ''
carryingCostOfReceivables > 0.05 * netRevenue ? 'Negotiate faster payment terms or offer discounts' : ''
customerSpecificCosts > 0.2 * (revenuePerUnit * unitsSold) ? 'Analyze and reduce customer-specific costs' : ''
